name: Jinke Property Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Jinke Property Group Co., Ltd. primarily operates as a real estate development company in China. It develops residential, industrial, and commercial properties. The company also provides property management services for residential properties, commercial centers, office buildings, universities, government properties, hotel clubs, and others; generates wind power; and operates hotels. In addition, it offers asset management, industrial investment, and wealth management services, as well as real estate funds; landscape design and planning services; and architectural decoration services for hotels, shopping malls, banks, and office buildings. The company was formerly known as Chongqing Dongyuan Industrial Development Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jinke Property Group Co., Ltd. in June 2011. Jinke Property Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Chongqing, China.
